upgrades.edge_index_hint: Evarts A. Graham -> American Board of Surgery (society_founder, 1937-1941)
upgrades.notes_append: [Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 4559844 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | J Hist Med Allied Sci 1972 | content_match] Olch PD. 'Evarts A. Graham, the American College of Surgeons, and the American Board of Surgery.' J Hist Med Allied Sci. 1972 Jul;27(3):247-61. Documents Graham's central role in founding the ABS in 1937 and his position as first chairman.

[Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 4559844 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | J Hist Med Allied Sci 1972 | content_match] Olch PD. 'Evarts A. Graham, the American College of Surgeons, and the American Board of Surgery.' Documents ACS as primary institutional driver of ABS founding. Shared PMID with Graham->ABS edge.
